findings.jp: 外部ネットワークからの不正アクセスを防ぐために、内部ネットワークと外部ネットワークの間に置かれるもの
findings.zh: 为防止来自外部网络的非法访问而设置在内部网络与外部网络之间的设备
findings.en: A device placed between the internal network and the external network to prevent unauthorized access from the external network
findings.issue: JP もの = 'thing/something'; both ZH (设备) and EN (device) over-specify to 'device'. Firewalls can be software too. Minor over-specification, not wrong in context.
findings.recommended_fix: Optional: 'something placed between...' / '设置在...之间的事物' for fidelity. Low priority — common gloss.

findings.jp: PCの起動時にOSのデジタル署名を検証することで、許可されていないOSの実行を防ぐ技術
findings.zh: 在个人电脑（PC）启动时通过验证操作系统（OS）的数字签名来防止未经许可的操作系统（OS）运行的技术
findings.en: A technology that prevents the execution of unauthorized OS (Operating System) by verifying the digital signature of the OS (Operating System) at PC (Personal Computer) startup
findings.issue: EN expands 'OS (Operating System)' twice in one sentence — verbose. Expand on first mention only. ZH similarly repeats 操作系统（OS） twice.
findings.recommended_fix: EN: expand only first OS; second occurrence as 'OS'. Same for ZH.
